en: He just got away from us, I'm sorry.
Can we go in there? If you want, not a lot to see.
Maybe not for you, but for us.
And that's when the family realized that George Sr. wasn't dead,
ko: 그리고 그때 가족은 조지 시니어가 죽지 않았다는 것을 깨달았다.

en: but was fleeing the country that he loved so very much.
ko: 그가 사랑하는 나라를 떠나고 있었던 거야.

en: I'm going to war! As an act of defiance to Lucille,
he first went swimming in the ocean, where he was attacked by a loose seal.
Soon, Michael and George Michael arrived at the hospital.
ko: 곧 마이클과 조지 마이클이 병원에 도착했다.

en: If something happens to Buster, I'll be lost.
ko: 버스터에게 무슨 일이 생기면, 나는 길을 잃을 거야.
